problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
hypothesis: The key to What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient is Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity — specifically Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition — which would help 280,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
